1. # **Deposit Number List** 

 Create new endpoint :  
Type 		: application/json  
Method		: GET  
URL		: /finance/v1/deposits

### **Headers**

---

| Accept | application/json |
| :---- | :---- |
| Authorization | Bearer Token |

### **Params** 

---

| Field | Type | Required | Note |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| q |  |  |  |
| page | Integer | Yes | default : 1 |
| limit  | Integer | Yes | default : 20 |
| sort | String | Yes | default created\_date:desc  |
| collector\_id | Array\<int\> | Yes | filter acf.deposit.emp\_id  |

**Example Request :**

| curl \-X GET "https://your-api-base.com/finance/v1/deposits?q=\&page=1\&limit=20\&sort=created\_date:desc\&collector\_id=123,124" \\   \-H "Accept: application/json" \\   \-H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR\_BEARER\_TOKEN" |
| :---- |

**Account Payable**

| SELECT      *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date,     *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no AS *deposit\_no*,     *mu*.user\_fullname AS *collector*,     SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 1 THEN *appo*.balance  ELSE 0 END) AS *cash*,     SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 2 THEN *appo*.balance ELSE 0 END) AS *cheque\_bg*,     SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 3 THEN *appo*.balance ELSE 0 END) AS *transfer*,     SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 4 THEN *appo*.balance ELSE 0 END) AS *return\_amount*,     SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 5 THEN *appo*.balance ELSE 0 END) AS *credit\_debit*,     SUM(*appo*.balance) AS *total\_payment* FROM acf.account\_payable\_payment *app* JOIN sys.m\_user *mu*      ON *mu*.user\_id \= *app*.created\_by  left JOIN acf.account\_payable\_payment\_options *appo*      ON *appo*.account\_payable\_payment\_no \= *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no  WHERE   	*app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date  between '2026-02-01' and '2026-04-30'  	and *app*.cust\_id \='C220010001'  	and *app*.deleted\_by  is null GROUP BY      *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date,     *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no,     *mu*.user\_fullname;  |
| :---- |

**Account Receivable**

| select      *d*.deposit\_date,     *d*.deposit\_no,     *d*.salesman\_id,     *d*.total\_payment,     sum(case when *dp*.pay\_type \= 1 then *dp*.payment\_amount else 0 end) as *cash\_amount*,     sum(case when *dp*.pay\_type \= 2 then *dp*.payment\_amount else 0 end) as *cheque*,     sum(case when *dp*.pay\_type \= 3 then *dp*.payment\_amount else 0 end) as *transfer*,     sum(case when *dp*.pay\_type \= 4 then *dp*.payment\_amount else 0 end) as *return*,     sum(case when *dp*.pay\_type \= 5 then *dp*.payment\_amount else 0 end) as *cn*,      SUM(coalesce(*de*.payment\_amount, 0)) as *expense* from acf.deposit *d* join acf.deposit\_payment *dp*      on *dp*.deposit\_no \= *d*.deposit\_no left join acf.deposit\_expense *de*  	on *de*.deposit\_no \= *d*.deposit\_no  where *d*.deposit\_date between '2026-02-01' and '2026-04-30'   AND *d*.cust\_id \='C220010001' group by     *d*.deposit\_date,     *d*.deposit\_no,     *d*.salesman\_id,     *d*.total\_payment; |
| :---- |

### **Response  :** 

---

| Nama Atribut | Type  | Length | Description |
| :---- | :---- | ----- | :---- |
| message | String | 150 | Response message |
| data | Array | \- | Object data response |
| deposit\_no |  |  | acf.deposit.deposit\_no  |
| collector\_id |  |  | acf.deposit.emp\_id  |
| deposit\_date  |  |  | acf.deposit.deposit\_date  |
| **pagination** | **Object** | **\-** | **Pagination information** |
| page | Int | 4 | Current page |
| limit | Int | 4 | Data per page |
| total\_data | Int | 8 | Total data |
| total\_page | Int | 4 | Total page |

**Example Response :**

| {   "message": "Data berhasil ditampilkan",   "data": \[     {       "deposit\_no": "DEP-2026-001",       "collector\_id": 123,       "deposit\_date": "2026-02-01T00:00:00Z"     },     {       "deposit\_no": "DEP-2026-002",       "collector\_id": 456,       "deposit\_date": "2026-02-02T00:00:00Z"     }   \],   "pagination": {     "page": 1,     "limit": 10,     "total\_data": 72,     "total\_page": 8   } }  |
| :---- |

2. # **Report Payment Deposit** 

 Create new endpoint :  
Type 		: application/json  
Method		: GET  
URL		: /finance/v1/reports/payment-deposit

### **Headers**

---

| Accept | application/json |
| :---- | :---- |
| Authorization | Bearer Token |

### **Params** 

---

| Field | Type | Required | Note |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| q |  |  |  |
| page | Integer | Yes | default : 1 |
| limit  | Integer | Yes | default : 20 |
| sort | String | Yes | default created\_date:desc  |
| deposit\_type | String\[\] | Yes | AP \= Account Payable AR \= Account Receivable |
| start\_date | epoch  | Yes | if deposit\_type \= AP acf.deposit.deposit\_date if deposit\_type \= AR acf.account\_payable\_payment.account\_payable\_payment\_date |
| end\_date | epoch  | Yes |  |
| emp\_id | Integer\[\] | Yes | if deposit\_type \= AP acf.deposit.emp\_id if deposit\_type \= AR tidak ada |
| deposit\_no | Array\[\] | No | if deposit\_type \= AP acf.deposit.deposit\_no if deposit\_type \= AR account\_payable\_payment\_no |

### 

**Example Request :**

| curl \--location \--request GET \\   'https://best.scyllax.online/finance/v1/reports/payment-deposit?start\_date=2024-11-01\&end\_date=2024-11-30\&salesman\_id=1\&deposit\_no=DP251212001,DP251212002\&page=1\&limit=10' \\   \--header 'Authorization: Bearer \<access\_token\>' |
| :---- |

### **Query  :** 

---

#### **Case 1  \- Deposit Type Account Receivable** {#case-1---deposit-type-account-receivable}

| ![][image1]    SELECT          *d*.deposit\_date,         'Account Receivable' AS *deposit\_type*,         *d*.deposit\_no,         CAST(*me*.emp\_name   AS VARCHAR) AS *collector*,         *dp*.*cash*,         *dp*.*cheque\_bg*,         *dp*.*transfer*,         *dp*.*return*,         *dp*.*credit\_debit*,         COALESCE(*de*.*expense*, 0\) AS *expense*,         (         COALESCE(*dp*.*cash*, 0\) \+         COALESCE(*dp*.*cheque\_bg*, 0\) \+         COALESCE(*dp*.*transfer*, 0\) \+         COALESCE(*dp*.*return*, 0\) \+         COALESCE(*dp*.*credit\_debit*, 0\) \-         COALESCE(*de*.*expense*, 0\)     ) AS *total\_payment*     FROM acf.deposit *d*     \-- PRE-AGGREGATE PAYMENT     JOIN (         SELECT              deposit\_no, cust\_id,              SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 1 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cash*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 2 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cheque\_bg*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 3 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *transfer*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 4 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *return*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 5 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *credit\_debit*         FROM acf.deposit\_payment         GROUP BY deposit\_no, cust\_id     ) *dp*          ON *dp*.deposit\_no \= *d*.deposit\_no           AND *dp*.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'     left join mst.m\_employee *me*      	on *me*.emp\_id \= *d*.emp\_id       \-- PRE-AGGREGATE EXPENSE     LEFT JOIN (         SELECT              deposit\_no, cust\_id,             SUM(payment\_amount) AS *expense*         FROM acf.deposit\_expense         GROUP BY deposit\_no, cust\_id     ) *de*          ON *de*.deposit\_no \= *d*.deposit\_no         and *de*.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'     WHERE          *d*.deposit\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'         AND *d*.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'         and *d*.emp\_id in (381, 421\)  ![][image2] Simulasi Mas Syafiq :  [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17a0QS\_jZfJ\_OVP1tx\_1iA83DoA\_ZMRNPZQBTC7F1EWQ/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17a0QS_jZfJ_OVP1tx_1iA83DoA_ZMRNPZQBTC7F1EWQ/edit?usp=sharing)   |
| :---- |

#### **Case 2  \- Deposit Type Account Payable** {#case-2---deposit-type-account-payable}

| ![][image3]            SELECT \*,        (*cash* \+ *cheque\_bg* \+ *transfer* \+ *return* \+ *credit\_debit* \- *expense*) AS *total\_payment* FROM (     SELECT          *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date AS *deposit\_date*,         'Account Payable' AS *deposit\_type*,         *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no AS *deposit\_no*,         '' AS *collector*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 1 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cash*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 2 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cheque\_bg*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 3 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *transfer*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 4 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *return*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 5 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *credit\_debit*,         0 AS *expense*     FROM acf.account\_payable\_payment *app*     JOIN sys.m\_user *mu*          ON *mu*.user\_id \= *app*.created\_by      LEFT JOIN acf.account\_payable\_payment\_options *appo*          ON *appo*.account\_payable\_payment\_no \= *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no      WHERE           *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-27'         AND *app*.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'          AND *app*.deleted\_by IS NULL     GROUP BY          *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date,         *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no,         *mu*.user\_fullname ) *t*; ![][image4]  |
| :---- |

#### **Case 3  \- Deposit Type Account Receivable \+ Account Payable**

| ![][image5] SELECT \* FROM (     \-- \========================     \-- ACCOUNT RECEIVABLE (AR)     \-- \========================     SELECT          *d*.deposit\_date,         'Account Receivable' AS *deposit\_type*,         *d*.deposit\_no,         CAST(*me*.emp\_name AS VARCHAR) AS *collector*,         COALESCE(*dp*.*cash*, 0\) AS *cash*,         COALESCE(*dp*.*cheque\_bg*, 0\) AS *cheque\_bg*,         COALESCE(*dp*.*transfer*, 0\) AS *transfer*,         COALESCE(*dp*.*return*, 0\) AS *return*,         COALESCE(*dp*.*credit\_debit*, 0\) AS *credit\_debit*,         COALESCE(*de*.*expense*, 0\) AS *expense*,         (             COALESCE(*dp*.*cash*, 0\) \+             COALESCE(*dp*.*cheque\_bg*, 0\) \+             COALESCE(*dp*.*transfer*, 0\) \+             COALESCE(*dp*.*return*, 0\) \+             COALESCE(*dp*.*credit\_debit*, 0\) \-             COALESCE(*de*.*expense*, 0\)         ) AS *total\_payment*     FROM acf.deposit *d*     JOIN (         SELECT              deposit\_no, cust\_id,              SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 1 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cash*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 2 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cheque\_bg*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 3 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *transfer*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 4 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *return*,             SUM(CASE WHEN pay\_type \= 5 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *credit\_debit*         FROM acf.deposit\_payment         WHERE cust\_id \= 'C260020001'   \-- 🔥 filter dipush ke dalam (lebih cepat)         GROUP BY deposit\_no, cust\_id     ) *d*p          ON *d*p.deposit\_no \= d.deposit\_no      LEFT JOIN mst.m\_employee *m*e          ON *m*e.emp\_id \= d.emp\_id       LEFT JOIN (         SELECT              deposit\_no, cust\_id,             SUM(payment\_amount) AS *expens*e         FROM acf.deposit\_expense         WHERE cust\_id \= 'C260020001'   \-- 🔥 filter dipush ke dalam         GROUP BY deposit\_no, cust\_id     *)* de          ON de.deposit\_no *\=* d.deposit\_no     WHERE          d.deposit\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'         AND d.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'         AND d.emp\_id IN (381, 421\)     UNION ALL     \-- \========================     \-- ACCOUNT PAYABLE (AP)     \-- \========================     SELECT          *a*pp.account\_payable\_payment\_date AS *deposit\_da*te,         'Account Payable' AS *deposit\_ty*pe,         *a*pp.account\_payable\_payment\_no AS *deposit\_*no,         '' AS *collect*or,         SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 1 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *ca*sh,         SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 2 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cheque\_*bg,         SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 3 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *transf*er,         SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 4 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *retu*rn,         SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 5 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *credit\_deb*it,         0 AS *expen*se,         (             SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 1 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) \+             SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 2 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) \+             SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 3 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) \+             SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 4 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) \+             SUM(CASE WHEN *ap*po.pay\_type \= 5 THEN *ap*po.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END)         ) AS *total\_payme*nt     FROM acf.account\_payable\_payment *a*pp     LEFT JOIN acf.account\_payable\_payment\_options *ap*po          ON *ap*po.account\_payable\_payment\_no *\= a*pp.account\_payable\_payment\_no      WHERE           *a*pp.account\_payable\_payment\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'         AND *a*pp.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'          AND *a*pp.deleted\_by IS NULL     GROUP BY          *a*pp.account\_payable\_payment\_date,         *a*pp.account\_payable\_payment\_no *)* t ORDER BY deposit\_date ASC;  ![][image6] |
| :---- |

### **Response  :** 

---

* ##### **Account Receivable**

| Nama Atribut | Type  | Length | Description |
| :---- | :---- | ----- | :---- |
| message | String | 150 | Response message |
| data | Object | \- | Object data response |
| **items** | **Array** | **\-** | **List data payment deposit** |
| deposit\_date | Date | \- | **acf.deposit.**deposit\_date |
| deposit\_no | String | 30 | **acf.deposit.**deposit\_no |
| deposit\_type | String  | 50 | **default \= Account Receivable**  |
| collector\_id | Int | 8 | **acf.deposit.**emp\_id |
| collector\_code | String | 10 | **mst.m\_employee.**emp\_code |
| collector\_name | String | 100 | **mst.m\_employee.**emp\_name |
| cash\_amount | Int | 11 | [cek query](#case-1---deposit-type-account-receivable)  |
| cheque\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| transfer\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| return\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| credit\_debit\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| expense\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| total\_payment | Int | 11 |  |
| **pagination** | **Object** | **\-** | **Pagination information** |
| page | Int | 4 | Current page |
| limit | Int | 4 | Data per page |
| total\_data | Int | 8 | Total data |
| total\_page | Int | 4 | Total page |
| request\_id | String  |  |  |

* ##### **Account Payable**

| Nama Atribut | Type  | Length | Description |
| :---- | :---- | ----- | :---- |
| message | String | 150 | Response message |
| data | Object | \- | Object data response |
| **items** | **Array** | **\-** | **List data payment deposit** |
| deposit\_date | Date | \- | **acf.account\_payable\_payment.**account\_payable\_payment\_date |
| deposit\_no | String | 30 | **acf.account\_payable\_payment.**account\_payable\_payment\_no |
| deposit\_type | String  | 50 | **default \= Account Payable**  |
| collector\_id | Int | 8 | NULL |
| collector\_code | String | 10 | NULL |
| collector\_name | String | 100 | NULL |
| cash\_amount | Int | 11 | [cek query](#case-2---deposit-type-account-payable)  |
| cheque\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| transfer\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| return\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| credit\_debit\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| expense\_amount | Int | 11 |  |
| total\_payment | Int | 11 |  |
| **pagination** | **Object** | **\-** | **Pagination information** |
| page | Int | 4 | Current page |
| limit | Int | 4 | Data per page |
| total\_data | Int | 8 | Total data |
| total\_page | Int | 4 | Total page |
| request\_id | String  |  |  |

### **Response  JSON:** 

---

* ##### **Account Receivable**

| {   "message": "Data berhasil ditampilkan",   "data": {     "items": \[       {         "deposit\_date": "2024-11-10",         "deposit\_no": "DP251212001",         "deposit\_type": "Account Receivable",         "collector\_id": 1,         "collector\_code": "001",         "collector\_name": "Agus",         "cash\_amount": 500000,         "cheque\_amount": 0,         "transfer\_amount": 800000,         "return\_amount": 0,         "credit\_debit\_amount": 0,         "expense\_amount": 25000,         "total\_payment": 1750000       }     \],     "pagination": {       "page": 1,       "limit": 10,       "total\_data": 72,       "total\_page": 8     }   }   "request\_id": "REQ-20261110-0001", }  |
| :---- |

* ##### **Account Payable**

| {   "message": "Data berhasil ditampilkan",   "data": {     "items": \[       {         "deposit\_date": "2024-11-10",         "deposit\_no": "PY251212001",         "deposit\_type": "Account Payable",         "collector\_id": 1,         "collector\_code": "001",         "collector\_name": "Agus",         "cash\_amount": 500000,         "cheque\_amount": 0,         "transfer\_amount": 800000,         "return\_amount": 0,         "credit\_debit\_amount": 0,         "expense\_amount": 25000,         "total\_payment": 1750000       }     \],     "pagination": {       "page": 1,       "limit": 10,       "total\_data": 72,       "total\_page": 8     }   }   "request\_id": "REQ-20261110-0001", }  |
| :---- |


* ##### **Account Receivable \&Payable**

| {   "message": "Data berhasil ditampilkan",   "data": {     "items": \[       {         "deposit\_date": "2024-11-10",         "deposit\_no": "PY251212001",         "deposit\_type": "Account Payable",         "collector\_id": 1,         "collector\_code": "001",         "collector\_name": "Agus",         "cash\_amount": 500000,         "cheque\_amount": 0,         "transfer\_amount": 800000,         "return\_amount": 0,         "credit\_debit\_amount": 0,         "expense\_amount": 25000,         "total\_payment": 1750000       },   {         "deposit\_date": "2024-11-10",         "deposit\_no": "DP251212001",         "deposit\_type": "Account Receivable",         "collector\_id": 1,         "collector\_code": "001",         "collector\_name": "Agustin",         "cash\_amount": 500000,         "cheque\_amount": 0,         "transfer\_amount": 800000,         "return\_amount": 0,         "credit\_debit\_amount": 0,         "expense\_amount": 25000,         "total\_payment": 1750000       }     \],     "pagination": {       "page": 1,       "limit": 10,       "total\_data": 72,       "total\_page": 8     }   }   "request\_id": "REQ-20261110-0001", }  |
| :---- |


  


3. # **Report Payment Download** 

# ![][image7] 

 Create new endpoint :  
Type 		: application/json  
Method		: GET  
URL		: /finance/v1/reports/payment-deposit/download

### **Headers**

---

| Accept | application/json |
| :---- | :---- |
| Authorization | Bearer Token |

### **Params** 

---

| Field | Type | Required | Note |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| page | Integer | Yes | default : 1 |
| limit  | Integer | Yes | default : 20 |
| sort | String | Yes | default created\_date:desc  |
| start\_date | epoch  | Yes |  |
| end\_date | epoch  | Yes |  |
| salesman\_id | Integer | Yes |  |
| deposit\_no | Array\<int\> | No |  |

### 

**Example Request :**

| curl \--location \--request GET \\   'https://best.scyllax.online/finance/v1/reports/payment-deposit/download?start\_date=2024-11-01\&end\_date=2024-11-30\&salesman\_id=1\&deposit\_no=DP251212001,DP251212002\&page=1\&limit=10' \\   \--header 'Authorization: Bearer \<access\_token\>' |
| :---- |

### **Response  (jika masih processing di BE) :** 

| {    "message": "Processing time may vary by file size. Please check Download History to access the file",    "data": null ,    "request\_id": "9e79811e-4214-4567-94fe-84d8f37ef172" }  |
| :---- |

### **Response   (jika sukses) :** 

| {    "message": "",    "data": {        "report\_id": "69424720904ba4ec4bd832d4",        "report\_name": "DownloadDepositPayment-171225-001",        "start\_date": "2025-12-17",        "end\_date": "2025-12-17",        "file\_status": 1,        "file\_status\_name": "Ready",        "created\_by": "Admin DT Bangka 01",        "created\_at": "2025-12-17T06:01:04.405513856Z"    },    "paging": {        "total\_record": 1,        "page\_current": 0,        "page\_limit": 0,        "page\_total": 1    },    "request\_id": "9e79811e-4214-4567-94fe-84d8f37ef172" } |
| :---- |

* **Format Generate Name File :** DownloadDepositPayment-DDMMYY-3digitRunningNumber  
* **Proses no 3 : (insert data → report.list**

| Field | Data Source |
| :---- | :---- |
| cust\_id | Diisi cust id user yang login |
| report\_id | generate BE |
| report\_name | Diisi dengan format : DownloadDepositPayment-DDMMYY-3digitRunningNumber |
| start\_date | Diisi Tanggal sekarang  |
| end\_date | start\_date \+ 30  |
| file\_status | 0 jika proses generate selesai , update value 1  |
| file\_url  | NULL  |
| file\_base64 | add new field  diisi file base64 hasil generate be , di proses ini masih kosong karena masih proses generate  jika proses generate selesai , update value base64 |

Format Excel : (TAB hasil cek Export)  
[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17a0QS\_jZfJ\_OVP1tx\_1iA83DoA\_ZMRNPZQBTC7F1EWQ/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17a0QS_jZfJ_OVP1tx_1iA83DoA_ZMRNPZQBTC7F1EWQ/edit?usp=sharing) 

##### 

##### **Query Account Receivable**

| ![][image8] SELECT      *d*.deposit\_date,     'Account Receivable' AS *deposit\_type*,     *d*.deposit\_no,     CAST(me.emp\_name AS VARCHAR) AS *collector*,     dp.invoice\_date as *document\_date*,     dp.outlet\_code as *code*, dp.outlet\_name as *business\_name*,     dp.invoice\_no AS *document\_no*,     dp.cash,     dp.cheque\_bg,     dp.transfer,     dp.return,     dp.credit\_debit,     dp.discount,     dd.payment\_balance,     0 AS *expense*,      '' as *expense\_name* FROM acf.deposit *d* JOIN (     SELECT          dp2.deposit\_no,          dp2.cust\_id,          dp2.invoice\_no,          o.invoice\_date,         o.outlet\_id,         mo.outlet\_code, mo.outlet\_name,         dp2.discount,         SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 1 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS cash,         SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 2 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS cheque\_bg,         SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 3 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS transfer,         SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 4 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS return,         SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 5 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS credit\_debit      FROM acf.deposit\_payment  dp2     join sls.order o      	on o.invoice\_no \= dp2.invoice\_no and o.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'     join mst.m\_outlet mo      	on o.outlet\_id \= mo.outlet\_id     GROUP BY deposit\_no, dp2.cust\_id, dp2.invoice\_no, discount, o.invoice\_date, o.outlet\_id, mo.outlet\_code, mo.outlet\_name ) dp      ON dp.deposit\_no \= d.deposit\_no      AND dp.cust\_id \= 'C260020001' JOIN acf.deposit\_detail dd      ON dd.invoice\_no \= dp.invoice\_no      AND dd.deposit\_no \= dp.deposit\_no  LEFT JOIN mst.m\_employee me      ON me.emp\_id \= d.emp\_id   WHERE      d.deposit\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'     AND d.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'     AND d.emp\_id IN (381, 421\) UNION ALL \-- \======================== \-- 2\. BARIS EXPENSE \-- \======================== SELECT      d.deposit\_date,     'Account Receivable' AS deposit\_type,     d.deposit\_no,     CAST(me.emp\_name AS VARCHAR) AS collector,     de.expense\_date as document\_date,     '' as code, '' as business\_name,     de.doc\_no AS document\_no,     0 AS cash,     0 AS cheque\_bg,     0 AS transfer,     0 AS return,     0 AS credit\_debit,     0 AS discount,     0 AS payment\_balance,     COALESCE(de.expense, 0\) AS expense,      de.expense\_name e  FROM acf.deposit d LEFT JOIN mst.m\_employee me      ON me.emp\_id \= d.emp\_id   LEFT JOIN (     SELECT          deposit\_no, e.doc\_no , e."date" as expense\_date, et.expense\_type\_name as expense\_name,         de2.cust\_id,         SUM(payment\_amount) AS expense     FROM acf.deposit\_expense de2     join acf.expense e      	on e.expense\_id \= de2.expense\_id      join acf.expense\_type et      	on et.expense\_type\_id \= e.expense\_type\_id     GROUP BY deposit\_no,e.doc\_no , de2.cust\_id, e."date", et.expense\_type\_name ) de      ON de.deposit\_no \= d.deposit\_no     AND de.cust\_id \= 'C260020001' WHERE      d.deposit\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'     AND d.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'     AND d.emp\_id IN (381, 421\)     AND COALESCE(de.expense, 0\) \<\> 0  ![][image9] |
| :---- |

##### **Query Account Payable**

| ![][image10] SELECT \* FROM (     SELECT          *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date AS *deposit\_date*,         'Account Payable' AS *deposit\_type*,         *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no AS *deposit\_no*,         '' AS *collector*,         *ap*.invoice\_date as *document\_date*,          *ms*.sup\_code as *code*,         *ms*.sup\_name as *business\_name*,         *appo*.invoice\_no,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 1 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cash*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 2 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *cheque\_bg*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 3 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *transfer*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 4 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *return*,         SUM(CASE WHEN *appo*.pay\_type \= 5 THEN *appo*.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS *credit\_debit*,         *appd*.payment\_balance ,          *appd*.discount ,         0 AS *expense*,         0 as *expense\_type*     FROM acf.account\_payable\_payment *app*     JOIN sys.m\_user *mu*          ON *mu*.user\_id \= *app*.created\_by      LEFT JOIN acf.account\_payable\_payment\_options *appo*          ON *appo*.account\_payable\_payment\_no \= *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no      left join acf.account\_payable\_payment\_detail *appd*      	on *appd*.account\_payable\_payment\_no  \= *appo*.account\_payable\_payment\_no  and *appd*.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'      left join acf.account\_payable *ap*      	on *ap*.invoice\_no \= *appo*.invoice\_no and *ap*.cust\_id \='C260020001'      left join mst.m\_supplier *ms*      	on *ms*.sup\_id \= *ap*.sup\_id      WHERE           *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-27'         AND *app*.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'          AND *app*.deleted\_by IS NULL     GROUP BY          *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_date,         *app*.account\_payable\_payment\_no,         *appo*.invoice\_no,         *mu*.user\_fullname,          *appd*.payment\_balance,          *appd*.discount,           *ap*.invoice\_date,           *ms*.sup\_code , *ms*.sup\_name  ) *t*;  ![][image11] |
| :---- |

##### **Query Account Receivable & Payable**

| ![][image12] SELECT \* FROM (     \-- \========================     \-- 1\. AR \- INVOICE     \-- \========================     SELECT          d.deposit\_date,         'Account Receivable' AS deposit\_type,         d.deposit\_no,         CAST(me.emp\_name AS VARCHAR) AS collector,         dp.invoice\_date AS *document\_date*,         dp.outlet\_code AS *code*,         dp.outlet\_name AS *business\_name*,         dp.invoice\_no AS *document\_no*,         dp.cash,         dp.cheque\_bg,         dp.transfer,         dp.return,         dp.credit\_debit,         dp.discount,         dd.payment\_balance,         0 AS expense,         '' AS expense\_name     FROM acf.deposit d     JOIN (         SELECT              dp2.deposit\_no,              dp2.cust\_id,              dp2.invoice\_no,              o.invoice\_date,             mo.outlet\_code,              mo.outlet\_name,             dp2.discount,             SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 1 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS cash,             SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 2 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS cheque\_bg,             SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 3 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS transfer,             SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 4 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS return,             SUM(CASE WHEN dp2.pay\_type \= 5 THEN payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS credit\_debit          FROM acf.deposit\_payment dp2         JOIN sls.order o              ON o.invoice\_no \= dp2.invoice\_no              AND o.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'         JOIN mst.m\_outlet mo              ON o.outlet\_id \= mo.outlet\_id         GROUP BY              dp2.deposit\_no, dp2.cust\_id, dp2.invoice\_no,             dp2.discount, o.invoice\_date, mo.outlet\_code, mo.outlet\_name     ) dp          ON dp.deposit\_no \= d.deposit\_no          AND dp.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'     JOIN acf.deposit\_detail dd          ON dd.invoice\_no \= dp.invoice\_no          AND dd.deposit\_no \= dp.deposit\_no      LEFT JOIN mst.m\_employee me          ON me.emp\_id \= d.emp\_id       WHERE          d.deposit\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'         AND d.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'         AND d.emp\_id IN (381, 421\)     UNION ALL     \-- \========================     \-- 2\. AR \- EXPENSE     \-- \========================     SELECT          d.deposit\_date,         'Account Receivable' AS deposit\_type,         d.deposit\_no,         CAST(me.emp\_name AS VARCHAR) AS collector,         de.expense\_date AS document\_date,         '' AS code,         '' AS business\_name,         de.doc\_no AS document\_no,         0 AS cash,         0 AS cheque\_bg,         0 AS transfer,         0 AS return,         0 AS credit\_debit,         0 AS discount,         0 AS payment\_balance,         COALESCE(de.expense, 0\) AS expense,         de.expense\_name     FROM acf.deposit d     LEFT JOIN mst.m\_employee me          ON me.emp\_id \= d.emp\_id       LEFT JOIN (         SELECT              de2.deposit\_no,             de2.cust\_id,             e.doc\_no,             e."date" AS expense\_date,             et.expense\_type\_name AS expense\_name,             SUM(de2.payment\_amount) AS expense         FROM acf.deposit\_expense de2         JOIN acf.expense e              ON e.expense\_id \= de2.expense\_id          JOIN acf.expense\_type et              ON et.expense\_type\_id \= e.expense\_type\_id         GROUP BY              de2.deposit\_no, de2.cust\_id,             e.doc\_no, e."date", et.expense\_type\_name     ) de          ON de.deposit\_no \= d.deposit\_no         AND de.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'     WHERE          d.deposit\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'         AND d.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'         AND d.emp\_id IN (381, 421\)         AND COALESCE(de.expense, 0\) \<\> 0     UNION ALL     \-- \========================     \-- 3\. AP     \-- \========================     SELECT          app.account\_payable\_payment\_date AS deposit\_date,         'Account Payable' AS deposit\_type,         app.account\_payable\_payment\_no AS deposit\_no,         '' AS collector,         ap.invoice\_date AS document\_date,         ms.sup\_code AS code,         ms.sup\_name AS business\_name,         appo.invoice\_no AS document\_no,         SUM(CASE WHEN appo.pay\_type \= 1 THEN appo.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS cash,         SUM(CASE WHEN appo.pay\_type \= 2 THEN appo.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS cheque\_bg,         SUM(CASE WHEN appo.pay\_type \= 3 THEN appo.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS transfer,         SUM(CASE WHEN appo.pay\_type \= 4 THEN appo.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS return,         SUM(CASE WHEN appo.pay\_type \= 5 THEN appo.payment\_amount ELSE 0 END) AS credit\_debit,         appd.discount,         appd.payment\_balance,         0 AS expense,         '' AS expense\_name     FROM acf.account\_payable\_payment app     LEFT JOIN acf.account\_payable\_payment\_options appo          ON appo.account\_payable\_payment\_no \= app.account\_payable\_payment\_no      LEFT JOIN acf.account\_payable\_payment\_detail appd          ON appd.account\_payable\_payment\_no \= appo.account\_payable\_payment\_no           AND appd.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'      LEFT JOIN acf.account\_payable ap          ON ap.invoice\_no \= appo.invoice\_no          AND ap.cust\_id \='C260020001'      LEFT JOIN mst.m\_supplier ms          ON ms.sup\_id \= ap.sup\_id      WHERE           app.account\_payable\_payment\_date BETWEEN '2026-04-24' AND '2026-04-24'         AND app.cust\_id \= 'C260020001'          AND app.deleted\_by IS NULL     GROUP BY          app.account\_payable\_payment\_date,         app.account\_payable\_payment\_no,         appo.invoice\_no,         ap.invoice\_date,         ms.sup\_code,         ms.sup\_name,         appd.discount,         appd.payment\_balance ) t ORDER BY deposit\_date, deposit\_no;  |
| :---- |

[image5]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image6]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image7]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image8]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image9]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image10]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image11]: <data:image/png;base64,>

[image12]: <data:image/png;base64,>
